item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: You might could see him again soon depending on your reading speed :)

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
My read-through of your series continues, finally.

Definitely enjoyed the structure here. Conceptually, there's little here to separate this from other extradimensional location type articles (4971 came to mind), but there's a sense of history and flow that I can appreciate regardless. I'm not a Sarkic person at all, so I was a bit in the dark about what's happening, but it was still readable. 4712-A is an interesting character and I wish he was expanded on in some way.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Currently reading through your In Memoriam, months and months after you wrote this and now I think this compliment is even better because I super respect your opinion on Nalka lore.

Thanks!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Dialogue is definitely something I struggle with, i'll try to tweak it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Some of the dialogue is a bit stilted, but you convey your core ideas well, and it's nice to see a friendly or at least neutral Sarkic anomaly for once. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Gods below I love me some Sarkic shit.

+1, friend. Well done.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Ultimately requiring dosages of tranquilizer necessary to incapacitate an adolescent pachyderm.

That comment stands out as particularly non clinical, more likely they would place it terms of expected dosage for weight. I. E the anomaly required 7 times the expected dose for it's mass.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I wish I could have helped more when I Iooked at your draft, but this was a well written article, and I'm happy to upvote it.

item.title: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
Saturn is fallen, am I too to fall?
Am I to leave this haven of my rest,
This cradle of my glory, this soft clime,
This calm luxuriance of blissful light,
These crystalline pavilions, and pure fanes,
Of all my lucent empire? It is left
Deserted, void, nor any haunt of mine.
The blaze, the splendor, and the symmetry,
I cannot see – but darkness, death and darkness.

- John Keats, Hyperion


I have wanted to write something that touched Sarkicism since I first discovered the site 4 years ago, hopefully people enjoy this.

If you are interested in seeing of my other work, please visit my author page: Grigori Karpin's Author Page

+ Spoilers
- Close

1) SCP-4712-A was a very young boy when he was contained, he doesn't really know what a Karcist is or isn't. Additionally, he isn't super familiar with what it means to follow Nalka faith. He was "visited" by Ion in dreams and ultimately he was a scared teenager in a bad situation when Site-07 got moved to SCP-XXXX-B. He isn't a Karcist, he has merely one of the abilities of a Karcist, without much of the knowledge. What actually happened to him is up for debate.

2) When -A was contained, it was only 7 months after the end of WWII, and from a rural community in which there is unlikely to be good written public records. According to SCP-2191 it seems the Foundation started investigating the Solomonari in the late 1970s, so there is no reason to assume the Foundation would know to think there was presence of sarkics in the community if they weren't clued in. -A's parents would not have been super jazzed to divulge that stuff to Foundation staff either.

3) OG file is intentionally thin. Event-Alpha occurred in 1957, long before digitized records and most research materials would be at the site where research into Marius' ability was taking place, namely Site-07. The original file at the top of the page represents what the foundation put together after Event-Alpha, with little to no information concerning the ultimate fates of the people at Site-07. O5 council classifies the physical findings of Event-Alpha because they don't understand and decide to lock it up, rather than examine. They were afraid that something could happen to just wipe it off the face of the Earth. In 1991 when Site-07 is discovered through the gateway (SCP-4712), the findings are associated with the new file as they could then complete the story of what happened to the Site.


+ Credits
- Close

Information about pictures:

Store - https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:34_George_Street_(formerly_the_Westmoreland_Arms_pub)_02.jpg

inside –

Critique Thanks:
For line-by-line: Cantigaster_Cephalon, Veiedhimaedhr, Simartar, MalyceGraves, Francis Scalia, Alces_alces], A Blessed Feline, Calibri Bold, Rounderhouse

For helping me punch up Douglas’ freak out: glewmie, flojo-jojo, and Popsioak

EDIT: added the licensing footer to the article.

Hecatoncheires Cycle
